Bug / Task Description: localBroadcastStateLocked in bco-core/engine.go implements the media-pause grace hold: when local audio recently dropped below Media but the pre-drop tier was at least Media, the broadcast state should keep advertising the held pre-drop priority during the grace window. Currently a device whose pre-drop tier was exactly Media broadcasts its real (dropped) priority instead, so peers immediately see it as idle and a handover storm can begin. Higher tiers still hold correctly, masking the defect.
Commit Subject: fix(engine): correct prior-boost threshold for grace hold
